narrative:
New Albany-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,723 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
